# Freyr Technology AI Website Context

Freyr Technology AI presents itself as a high-performance computing service provider focused on advanced and customized computing resources for AI model training and inference. The website combines the company's legacy GPU infrastructure positioning with a new model catalog and API documentation experience.

## Website Purpose

The site is a static, no-database website for enterprise visitors evaluating GPU infrastructure, bare metal GPU leasing, deployment services, and AI model API access. It is designed to be precise, technical, and trustworthy.

## Primary Content

The home page introduces Freyr as a provider of high-performance GPU infrastructure for model inference and training. It links to a model catalog, API documentation, solutions, privacy information, and contact.

The Models page presents a model catalog with text models and image generation models. The prototype loads from a static JSON file at `/assets/models.json`. Production should replace or synchronize this catalog from an approved Freyr or provider endpoint that does not expose private API credentials in browser code.

The Pricing page presents text and image generation model prices loaded from `/assets/pricing.json`. The numeric values are prototype interface data and should be replaced with Freyr-approved official pricing before publication.

The API Docs page explains the intended integration structure for model discovery, text generation, image generation, authentication, errors, and support. Endpoint and authentication details must be confirmed by Freyr before publication.

The Solutions page summarizes GPU Solution, Bare Metal Leasing, and Delivery Service. It also includes a workload matrix for training, inference, computer vision, rendering, and enterprise evaluation.

The Privacy Policy page is draft legal copy for review. It should not be treated as final legal advice.

The Contact page lists Freyr's contact email, phone number, and Singapore office address, and includes a static inquiry form that opens an email draft.

## Contact Details

Freyr can be contacted at ContactUS@freyrtech.ai or +65 89585382. The listed Singapore office address is U-Club Prudential Tower 30 Cecil Street Level #14-01 Prudential Tower, Singapore 049712.

## Important Caveats

Model availability, official pricing, endpoint domains, authentication, API data retention, logging policies, and privacy promises must be confirmed by Freyr before production launch. Static browser code must not expose private API keys, signatures, or cloud-provider credentials.
